caption: A woman with dark hair and glasses stands against a solid dark background, delivering a presentation. She wears a light green tunic featuring delicate floral embroidery and a decorative dark trim around the neckline, complemented by a simple dark necklace. A small lapel microphone is clipped to her clothing. In the bottom left corner of each scene, a circular logo with the text "NPTEL" is visible. As the sequence progresses, the woman speaks, her mouth opening and closing to form words. She uses her hands to gesture, moving them slightly as she speaks, though they remain positioned in front of her chest. Her facial expressions shift slightly as she emphasizes different points, maintaining a focused and instructional demeanor throughout the clip.
